import json, re, os, sys, textwrap, math, unicodedata, difflib

hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"

def load_json(path):
    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        return json.load(f)

hadith_db = load_json(hadith_path)
len(hadith_db), list(hadith_db[0].keys())[:10]

import unicodedata, re

# Define normalization function
AR_TASHKEEL = re.compile(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        return ''
    # unify hamzas: convert different alef forms to bare alef
    text = text.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    text = text.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي')
    text = text.replace('ة', 'ه')
    # remove tashkeel
    text = AR_TASHKEEL.sub('', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', text, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # lowercase (though Arabic has no case)
    text = text.lower()
    # collapse whitespace
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

target_full = "إن الله ليؤيد هذا الدين بالرجل الفاجر"
norm_target_full = normalize_arabic(target_full)
norm_target_full

cand_phrase_norm = normalize_arabic(cand_phrase)
orig_norm = normalize_arabic(target_full)
ratio = SequenceMatcher(None, cand_phrase_norm, orig_norm).ratio()
cand_phrase, cand_phrase_norm, orig_norm, ratio
